title: Pojav Tier tagger
description: A client-side Fabric mod that displays player rankings from the official Pojav Tierlist.
body:
# Pojav Tier Tagger
The first dedicated tier tagging utility for the **PojavLauncher Tierlist** community. This mod fetches and displays the rankings of tier-tested players directly above their nametags in-game.

## ✨ Features
* **Automatic Tagging:** Displays tiers for all players officially tested on the Pojav Tierlist.
* **Customizable GUI:** Choose which gamemode tiers you want to see (Sword, Nethpot, etc.).
* **Optimized for Mobile:** Lightweight and built to run smoothly on PojavLauncher (Fabric).

## ⌨️ Controls
* **Open Settings Menu:** Press the **Comma ( , )** key to open the GUI and select your preferred gamemode display.


*Note: This is a client-side mod. It does not need to be installed on the server to work. Data is pulled from the official community tierlist.*
